entities.name: INOSITOL TRANSPORTERS
entities.description: Pivotal transporters for vital metabolites like lipids, minerals, and sugars, involved in plant metabolism and stress response.

entities.name: LIPIDS
entities.description: Vital metabolites transported by inositol transporters.

entities.name: MINERALS
entities.description: Vital metabolites transported by inositol transporters.

entities.name: SUGARS
entities.description: Vital metabolites transported by inositol transporters.

entities.name: TRANSITIONAL METABOLISM
entities.description: Process in which inositol transporters play an important role.

entities.name: SIGNALING PATHWAYS
entities.description: Systems regulating messages from hormones, neurotransmitters, and growth factors, influenced by inositol transporters.

entities.name: HORMONES
entities.description: Signaling molecules whose transduction is regulated by inositol transporters.

entities.name: NEUROTRANSMITTERS
entities.description: Signaling molecules whose transduction is regulated by inositol transporters.

entities.name: IMMUNOLOGIC FACTORS
entities.description: Signaling molecules whose transduction is regulated by inositol transporters.

entities.name: GROWTH FACTORS
entities.description: Signaling molecules whose transduction is regulated by inositol transporters.

entities.name: ANIMALS
entities.description: Organisms where inositol transporters have been extensively studied.

entities.name: PLANTS
entities.description: Organisms where the role of inositol transporters in physiology and stress tolerance is being studied.

entities.name: GROWTH
entities.description: A plant physiology stage regulated by inositol transporters.

entities.name: STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of plants to withstand external stressors, regulated by inositol transporters.

entities.name: EXTERNAL STRESSORS
entities.description: Environmental factors that trigger response mechanisms involving inositol genes.

entities.name: VACUOLES
entities.description: Organelles where vacuolar inositol transporters operate to influence plant molecular transition.

entities.name: VACUOLAR INOSITOL TRANSPORTERS
entities.description: Inositol transporters located in the vacuole, playing roles in plant growth and development.

entities.name: INOSITOL UPTAKE
entities.description: The process of taking up inositol, mediated by inositol transporters.

entities.name: METABOLIC PATHWAYS
entities.description: Pathways where inositol transporters play crucial roles through intracellular broadcasting.

entities.name: NA+/INOSITOL TRANSPORTERS
entities.description: Transporters characterized in animals and suggested to have roles in plants.

entities.name: H+/INOSITOL SYMPORTERS
entities.description: Transporters with specific kinetic functions and physiological roles in plants.

entities.name: PLANT STRESS ADAPTATION
entities.description: The process of adapting to stress, which is influenced by the inositol transporter functioning system.
